mapper.select:
SELECT o.*, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.phone, u.email FROM owner o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id
AND o.building = #{building}
AND (u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.room_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
